title: calamintha staminea
intro: Calamintha staminea, also known as clinopodium acinos, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the mint family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and carminative properties. Its health benefits include soothing digestive issues, relieving headaches, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing. Calamintha staminea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
